reviews.comment:
Impecable.
Nos consultaron si queriamos revisar aceite o agua.... excelente, pq en el resto de las estaciones nunca brindan ese servicio.
Los baños amplios lindos, con jabón y papel.

(Translated by Google)
Impeccable.
They asked us if we wanted to have the oil or water checked... excellent, because the other stations never offer that service.
The restrooms were spacious and nice, with soap and toilet paper.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtNmVfcmNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Un lugar excelente, sanitarios limpios y estacionas tranqui . Especial para mí que trabajo en la calle con un taxi.

(Translated by Google)
An excellent location, clean restrooms, and easy parking. Especially for me, since I work on the street with a taxi.
